title: Phantom Accessories
description: An Addonpack for Palladium that adds extra accessories for "Ghostly's Danny Phantom Heropack".
body:
An Addonpack for Palladium that adds extra accessories for "Ghostly's Danny Phantom Heropack". Currently I have white hair versions for all the Default Skins included with Minecraft alongside a few Custom Accessories for me, my friends, or people who requested some Danny Phantom Accessories on Discord/Patreon.

Custom Accessories Included:
- SplitLinkz's Hair
- Scarenve's Hair & Eyes
- PikachuOnAcid's Hair
- FSang18's Hair
- Cyber_D_Monke's Hair
- JustPurpl3's Hair & Eyes
- DemonGal6's Hair
- Inumis's Hair
- Jwalls604's Hair
- sSneakySnake's Hair
- Realspedy's Hair
- Mr_Marshmallowz's Hair
- Venozen75's Hair

CurseForge Link: 
- https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/phantom-accessories
- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/phantom-accessories
